response.justification: The candidate has roughly 19 years of hands-on software engineering experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus entrepreneurial experience as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products at scale; the candidate's AI exposure is recent and tooling-focused (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure) rather than strategic or widely recognized, and his career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery work rather than engineering leadership or advisory roles with strategic customers.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and active open-source contributor with public talks and workshops
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated director-level scope, strategy ownership, or engineering leadership of large teams/orgs
AI experience is recent and narrow; no recognized AI expertise, publications, or AI products/platforms at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of advising strategic customers or executives

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC role
Meets 15-year experience minimum with broad technical depth
Limited recognized AI expertise and strategy experience
